notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Ty France. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Ty France. Alex Bregman out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Allowed 102.1 mph
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. · Fielders Choice Out

notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki singles on a fly ball to left fielder Jase Bowen. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Cubs challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Shota Imanaga picks off Miguel Andujar at 1st on throw to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki singles on a fly ball to left fielder Jase Bowen. Pete Crow-Armstrong scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd.
